history.title: Messier catalogues M34
history.summary: Charles Messier records a loose cluster of small stars in Perseus.

history.title: Multicolor surveys
history.summary: Photographic and photoelectric campaigns map the main sequence.
history.detail: Jones & Prosser (1996) provide membership via proper motions to V ≈ 16.

history.title: Project Midas
history.summary: Isochrone–binary diagnostics on deep BVR(I) photometry.
history.detail: Excel and Python pipelines classify candidate single and binary stars.

history.title: Astrometric revolution
history.summary: Gaia parallaxes redefine cluster membership at scale.
history.detail: Cantat-Gaudin & Anders (2020) publish probabilistic member lists.

history.title: Revival & validation
history.summary: Cross-matching legacy photometry with Gaia and modern catalogs.
history.detail: Open questions: binary completeness and method comparison.
